findings.description: Chart images are missing structural tags.
findings.evidence:
Figures 1, 2, 7, 9, and 11 in the PDF are bar/line charts. In the HTML, these figures lack tags entirely. Instead, the raw text and data points from the charts were extracted into text blocks (e.g.,
). While the textual data is preserved, the visual structural elements are absent.
